Privacy
Home Apps Support Privacy

Legal

Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 2026

This Privacy Policy describes how HSR Utility ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, and protects information when you use our mobile application Pakiza ("the App"). By using the App, you agree to the practices described in this policy.

1. Information We Collect

Account Information

When you create an account, we collect your phone number (used for authentication via Firebase Phone Auth) or basic profile information if you sign in with Google (name, email address, profile photo).

App Data

We store data you generate within the App, including saved favourites, in-app preferences, and custom settings. This is stored securely in Firebase and linked to your account.

Usage & Analytics Data

We use Firebase Analytics to understand how users interact with the App. This includes information such as your device type, operating system version, language, app version, and which features you use. This data is aggregated and does not directly identify you.

Push Notification Tokens

If you enable push notifications, we store a Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) token associated with your account. This is used solely to send you relevant in-app notifications and is deleted when you delete your account or disable notifications.

Crash Reports

We use Firebase Crashlytics to receive anonymised crash reports to identify and fix bugs. These reports contain device state at the time of a crash but do not include personally identifiable information.

2. How We Use Your Information

  • — To provide, maintain, and improve the App and its features.
  • — To authenticate your identity and manage your account securely.
  • — To sync your favourites and preferences across devices (when signed in).
  • — To send push notifications relevant to the App (only if you have enabled them).
  • — To understand usage patterns and improve content curation.
  • — To diagnose technical issues and fix bugs.

3. Third-Party Services

We use the following third-party services to operate the App. Each has its own privacy policy governing how they handle data:

Google Firebase

Authentication, database, analytics, crash reporting, and push notifications.

https://firebase.google.com/support/privacy

Google Play Services

Required for app distribution and core Android functionality.

https://policies.google.com/privacy

4. Data Storage & Security

Your data is stored on Google Firebase infrastructure. We implement industry-standard security measures including encrypted connections (HTTPS/TLS) and Firebase Security Rules to restrict unauthorised access. No security measure is 100% guaranteed, but we take reasonable steps to protect your information.

5. Data Retention

Until deleted

Account & App Data

Deleted promptly upon a valid account deletion request.

14 months

Anonymised Analytics

Already anonymised — cannot be linked to you after account deletion.

90 days

Crash Logs

Contains no personal identifiers after account deletion.

6. Your Rights

You have the right to:

  • — Access the personal data we hold about you.
  • — Request correction of inaccurate data.
  • — Request permanent deletion of your account and associated data.
  • — Withdraw consent for push notifications at any time via your device settings.

To exercise any of these rights, please visit our account deletion page or contact us at support@hsrutility.com.

7. Children's Privacy

The App is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If you believe we have inadvertently collected information from a child, please contact us and we will delete it promptly.

8. Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we do, we will update the "Last updated" date at the top of this page. We encourage you to review this policy periodically. Continued use of the App after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

9. Contact Us

If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:

Email: support@hsrutility.com

Brand: HSR Utility
